message.body: Echo_Mask is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Christmas 2 (Secret Santa Games 2025) - Day 7 (short)
lol i opened twitch the same time you started
or as the song in vorm's stage in cn2.5 says, right on time
I watched Gaborro play my stage in JtoolJamplex, honestly I think had some good gameplay ideas but I would make most jump more lenient nowadays lol
so you haven't seen this before? I missed this game on stream
you can login to discord on the web browser and inspect element to get someone's profile picture iirc
he ate peanut because watching you play is like cinema
I won't be able to watch the stream so chances of rolling my game are higher, gl echoma1Arrive
who could it possibly be for
holy shit its my favorite avoidance player echo underscore mask
yeah i like this game too
roulette was cool, one of the leftover games, then i finally finished the new year needle game with all secrets, and then because i was sharing music with plasma i opened jtool jamplex
i might legit have like one screen left in jamplex
but i did say that when the song ended i was going to stop so it will have to be a different time
i also happened to leave one of the harder areas for last lol (fancyfishie)
yea that was like 8 hours, probably wont stream consistently again for a while until awards finish, will probably be only friday roulettes for a while
my plan was to assasinate that new year game once and for all
also this avoidance does looks a lot of fun, the sync is amazing
secrets range from really cool entrances and ideas, to really cryptic random stuff
but the game is also just hard
lmao i was about to say this fight looks cute but the song blech
one of the normal areas is like such a difficulty spike compared to everything else, and two of the secrets i would legit say are like 85 diff
i will definitely make like a pastebin with the secrets so that people can play the game a bit more straightforward instead
couldnt have done it without plasma, wolsk, raker, and many others, the last 2 secrets were really weird to find
ok cat is the one that legit felt like 85 to me
one of the other ones that felt like 85 wolsk said was way easier but that one is a bit more subjective cus its a really strange skill
theres vanilla needle secrets, simpler gimmick secrets, and some really wacky stuff
do those white apples even do anything?
santa works 1 day per year and i work 365 days per year, hows that fair
santa is looking through your browser history
@TheRandomErik god worked 1 week total before he retired, why do i have to work for 45 years+?
i wish i was good at avoidance, this game looks so fun
i might try it out later
plasma did a very good job with this game
he made all of the games in the bundle didn't you know
damn, if he did i could bully him more :(
i would never go for a vocaloid song
plasma wouldnt release 2 games within a decade
its not my go to at all but i do partake occasionally

hi plasma thanks for making this for me
winter king, wane and daedalus are in the same universe
dont say that, hes gonna revamp balloons again and the next 15 year timeline will start again
so yeah i cant put the winter king into anything else, i can't retcon my lore
hiddow is still the main maker in the credits
or do the complete opposite and do the january first gambit
i really do not care about the awards enough to adjust the release for it lol
wait did you mean to say balloons instead of dldc
all those things dont tell me anything
idk if i spelled doopliss right
more games that will never come out
it was pushed back and they fired all their workers trying to join a union in the UK
oh also I wanna try, the boshy inspired game
im really only waiting for KTL 2. or a discord makers EU side. sadly i have no hopes
idk if you wanna jump there
you were doing well, you just missed a lot of opportunities to run under
jumping is scary but you never learn if you dont take risks
saw vanvan mentioned, let it be known im working on another floor of that literally rn
i saw arzztt bring something up not long ago so i knew it was still in development
how are things looking on your side tho, plasma...
look at all those productive people here, that are def working on their games and making progress, including ian with his crimson game
im finishing off something else before the end of the month then that is all i have left
pssst, im trying to push him to continue
cause i miss playing the old type of shit once in a while. not the crap type but the cool type
the avoidance is messed up yeah
best classic type boss people rip off
now i want a colonel destination boss
white phase is last tis phase 5
i genuinely hope ian has something trashier than the bat
i love the bat, its so garbage but it doesnt get the love it deserves
i love making destination bosses in maker its so fun
making destination boss is the single thing that has given me the though ti dont ever wanna make a real boss again
i never finished a proper boss
so hard to hear reactbot since the game is so loud lol
that boss is p awesome but sadly i suck too hard :(
a long time ago i was making a 3 cherry boss based on smooooch but the cherries would die one by one and get buffed and i didn't know how to disable the dead cherries so i gave up
you can get stuck under those blocks but you can move in them since they're hollow lol
i checked at pre-existing code and basically certain alarms were enabled/disabled but i tried porting it over and shit didn't work
u already died to an apple like that before
the song with the 3 girls moving right then dancing around
but ngl whenever i tried copying code, that turned out shit so... KEKW
i tried to steal carnivals code for my destination fight and didnt even understand how the boss starts. so i gave up on that and stole from somewhere else
but yeah i tried to make a lovetrap type game, made 2 bosses the other being mario dying to a kaizo block like the spelunker boss in lovetrap then i quit
this was before i started working on the crimson game
i made my best game ever this secret santa
i havent made anything im truly happy with, and i never will
i got lucky with my request
it was easier than the first one i got
its also my worst game ever

2:09PlasmaNapkin: what did i miss? 2:10PlasmaNapkin: since the avoidance, did you beat it?

K3 may not have had the greatest design but the sense of progression in that game is outstanding
its one of the few fangames where it definitely felt like a journey from beginning to end

There will be secret balloons with cute dogs and cats on them
im not saying anything about the content
Plasma didnt deny so my guess seems correct
nah i wouldnt have answered if echo asked if chuck e cheese was in the game
we will riot if there isn't a single balloon
I mean he surely is, he could be your version of wonderful having kermit
but yeah i wasn't the biggest fan of the crystals tbh
i get they are a way to give replayability to a game thats been out for many years
yeah the crystals do nothing other than to unlock content
and the ones they added in 2.0 are really stupid
i dont like having a parallel challenge constantly while going through the game
it makes the actual content feel less impactful
it makes one boss easier but like, 95% of the people won't get to it
like "i only beat the save without getting the crystal, this was worthless because i have to do it again later"
you know i am not a 32px lover at all
this at least looks like fun 32px
